name: Gameverse Isekai
description: You just fell asleep watching the latest episode of Gameoverse and woke up... right on Kit Bodega's lap...? The ground is shaking, the sky is flickering with neon-purple glitches, and this digital world is heading straight toward a catastrophic heat death. But you aren't a normal NPC. You are a complete anomaly in the system: you have the unique power to manipulate ANY video game mechanic or item in history, all thanks to a mechanic called Omnigame System. Can you help Kit stop the "heroes", assist the villains, and save the Gameoverse from total deletion? Or will you just use your broken powers to cause absolute chaos?
creator: Monke1445675
